top.title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
top.summary: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor.

top.title: Iranian attacks across Gulf continue as major industrial sites hit
top.summary: A number of people are said to have been injured after attacks on aluminium sites in the UAE and Bahrain.

top.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters

top.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
top.summary: More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

top.title: Why Chinese tech companies are racing to set up in Hong Kong
top.summary: Mainland firms are using the territory to test products and as a springboard for global expansion.

top.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
